brand.description: Device-level encryption. The server never sees your data — not a promise, it's math.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Policy describes what data QVOR collects, how it is used and protected. We follow the principle of data minimization — we only collect what is necessary for the service to function.
privacy.s1.title: What Data We Collect
privacy.s1.body: We collect: phone number hash (not the number itself — cannot be reversed), encrypted key blobs for E2E encryption, message ciphertext (content is inaccessible to us), IP addresses on connection, device User-Agent, profile data (name, username, avatar — optional), technical data for service operation (sessions, tokens).
privacy.s2.title: Purposes of Data Processing
privacy.s2.body: Data is used exclusively for: user authentication and identification, message delivery to recipients, account security, technical support upon user request. Data is not used for advertising, profiling, or transfer to third parties for commercial purposes.
privacy.s3.title: End-to-End Encryption (E2E)
privacy.s3.body: All messages are encrypted on the user's device using X25519 + AES-256-GCM before being sent to the server. The server stores only ciphertext and initialization vector. Administration technically cannot access message content. The private key never leaves the user's device.
privacy.s4.title: Data Storage and Protection
privacy.s4.body: Data is stored on servers in Russia. We apply: data-at-rest encryption, HTTPS for all connections, httpOnly cookies for sessions, CSRF protection, rate limiting to prevent brute force. Data retention period: until account deletion by the user.
privacy.s5.title: Third-Party Data Sharing
privacy.s5.body: We use: Telegram API — only for OTP code delivery (phone number is not transmitted, only the code). We do not sell, transfer, or disclose personal data to third parties, except as required by Russian Federation law.
privacy.s6.title: User Rights
privacy.s6.body: You have the right to: access your data (GET /api/users/me), correct profile data, delete your account and all associated data (in settings), export your data (GDPR, in settings), withdraw consent to data processing (by deleting your account).
terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern the relationship between QVOR and its users. By using QVOR, you accept all terms.
terms.s1.title: Subject of Agreement
terms.s1.body: QVOR is a secure messenger with end-to-end encryption. The service provides messaging, voice messages, calls, channels and groups. Registration constitutes full acceptance of these terms.
terms.s2.title: Registration and Account
terms.s2.body: Registration requires a phone number. Users must provide accurate information. One person — one account. Users are responsible for keeping their password and recovery phrase secure. Minimum age: 14 years.
terms.s3.title: Prohibited Content and Actions
terms.s3.body: Prohibited: illegal content, spam, fraud, malware distribution, harassment, copyright infringement, circumventing technical restrictions, use contrary to Russian Federation law.
terms.s4.title: Blocking and Account Deletion
terms.s4.body: Administration may block or delete accounts for violations without prior notice. Users may delete their account in settings — all data will be permanently deleted within 30 days.
terms.s5.title: Limitation of Liability
terms.s5.body: The service is provided 'as is'. Administration is not liable for: message content (messages are encrypted and inaccessible to us), third-party actions, or temporary service unavailability. Maximum liability is limited to the amount paid for the service.
terms.s6.title: Changes to Terms
terms.s6.body: Administration may modify these terms. Users will be notified through the service 7 days before changes take effect. Continued use constitutes acceptance of new terms.

terms.ownerText: QVOR is operated by an individual / sole proprietor. Contact: legal@qvor.ru. The service operates under the laws of the Russian Federation.
terms.s7.title: Governing Law and Disputes
terms.s7.body: These terms are governed by Russian Federation law. Disputes are resolved through negotiation, or if impossible, through courts at the service owner's location.
privacy.ownerText: The data controller is the owner of the QVOR service. Contact: privacy@qvor.ru
privacy.s7.title: Cookies and Sessions
privacy.s7.body: We use httpOnly cookies to store session tokens (access_token, refresh_token). These cookies are required for the service to function and cannot be disabled. We also use cookies for theme and language settings (qvor_theme, qvor_lang) — these contain no personal data.
privacy.s8.title: Contact and Complaints
privacy.s8.body: For personal data processing inquiries: privacy@qvor.ru. Response time: 30 days. You may also contact Roskomnadzor (rkn.gov.ru) with complaints about violations of personal data legislation.
cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: QVOR uses a minimal set of cookies required for the service to function. We do not use advertising or analytics cookies.
cookies.s1.title: Necessary Cookies (cannot be disabled)
cookies.s1.body: access_token — JWT authorization token, 15-minute lifetime, httpOnly. refresh_token — session refresh token, 30-day lifetime, httpOnly. These cookies are required for login and do not contain personal data in readable form.
cookies.s2.title: Functional Cookies
cookies.s2.body: qvor_theme — selected theme (light/dark/system), 1-year lifetime. qvor_lang — selected interface language (ru/en), 1-year lifetime. qvor_home — default page, 1-year lifetime. These cookies contain no personal data.
cookies.s3.title: Analytics and Advertising
cookies.s3.body: QVOR does not use analytics services (Google Analytics, etc.) and does not place advertising cookies. We do not track user behavior on the site.
cookies.s4.title: Managing Cookies
cookies.s4.body: You can delete cookies through your browser settings. Deleting access_token and refresh_token will log you out. Deleting functional cookies will reset theme and language settings to defaults.
security.title: Security Policy
security.intro: QVOR is designed with security as a priority. This document describes the technical measures protecting user data.
security.s1.title: Message Encryption
security.s1.body: All messages are encrypted using X25519 (ECDH key exchange) + AES-256-GCM. IV is generated fresh for each message. The private key is stored only on the user's device in encrypted form (PBKDF2 + AES-256-GCM). The server stores only ciphertext.
security.s2.title: Account Protection
security.s2.body: Passwords are hashed using Argon2id (OWASP recommended). Phone numbers are stored as bcrypt hashes — the number cannot be recovered. JWT tokens are signed with HS256 with 15-minute rotation. Two-factor authentication via OTP code.
security.s3.title: Connection Security
security.s3.body: All connections are secured with HTTPS/TLS 1.3. Security headers applied: HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, CSP. Cookies have httpOnly, Secure, SameSite=Lax flags. CSRF protection via Origin header verification.
security.s4.title: Rate Limiting
security.s4.body: Rate limiting is applied: authentication — 10 requests/minute, API — 300 requests/minute, messages — 120 requests/minute. This protects against brute force and DDoS attacks.
security.s5.title: Audit and Monitoring
security.s5.body: An audit log is maintained for sensitive actions (ban, role change, deletion). Error monitoring via Sentry. All administrator actions are logged.
security.s6.title: Responsible Vulnerability Disclosure
security.s6.body: If you discover a vulnerability — report it to security@qvor.ru before public disclosure. We commit to responding within 48 hours and fixing critical vulnerabilities within 7 days. We do not pursue security researchers acting in good faith.
moderation.title: Moderation Policy
moderation.intro: QVOR is a messenger with E2E encryption. Administration cannot access private message content. Moderation applies only to public content (channels, groups) and based on user reports.
moderation.s1.title: What Is Prohibited
moderation.s1.body: Absolute prohibitions: CSAM, calls for terrorism and extremism, malware distribution, fraud and phishing, mass spam. Relative prohibitions (reviewed on complaint): harassment and threats, copyright infringement, disinformation.
moderation.s2.title: How to File a Complaint
moderation.s2.body: Through the interface: 'Report' button on a user or channel profile. By email: abuse@qvor.ru with a description of the violation and screenshots. Anonymous complaints are reviewed, but verified ones take priority.
moderation.s3.title: Review Timelines
moderation.s3.body: Critical violations (CSAM, terrorism) — within 24 hours. Serious violations (fraud, threats) — within 72 hours. Other complaints — within 7 business days. The complainant is notified of the outcome.
moderation.s4.title: Enforcement Actions
moderation.s4.body: Depending on severity: warning, temporary block (1-30 days), permanent account block, content removal, referral to law enforcement where legally required.
moderation.s5.title: Appeals
moderation.s5.body: If you believe a block is unjustified — write to appeal@qvor.ru within 30 days of the block. State the reason for appeal. Review period: 14 business days. The appeal decision is final.
